name: BALM Paired
description: Scan protein for every position/AA pair's likelihood. Score protein using either ft-ESM model (ESM2 with 650M parameters) finetuned from ESM2 or BALM-paired language model (modified RoBERTa-large with 355M parameters) finetuned from BALM.
capabilities: Scan protein for every position/AA pair's likelihood
Score protein using either ft-ESM model (ESM2 with 650M parameters) finetuned from ESM2 or BALM-paired language model (modified RoBERTa-large with 355M parameters) finetuned from BALM

heavy_chain.description: Antibody heavy chain amino acid sequence for paired likelihood scanning

light_chain.description: Antibody light chain amino acid sequence for paired likelihood scanning

model.description: Language model to use: BALM-paired (355M params) or ft-ESM (ESM2 650M params finetuned)
